tasks.title: Migrate runtime parsers to zod
tasks.description: Replace the hand-rolled validation in the request/response parsers (netlify/lib/parseStageImageRequest.ts, src/utils/parseStageImageResponse.ts, and any future ones) with zod schemas, for consistency with the content-collection schemas (src/content.config.ts already uses z from astro/zod) and better error messages. Keep the Parsed<T> result shape (wrap zod safeParse) so call sites are unchanged. Note: parseStageImageResponse ships to the browser via the admin island, so weigh the client bundle cost (and whether to depend on zod directly vs astro/zod).

tasks.title: Per-Artwork buy button (e-commerce)
tasks.description: Embeddable Stripe/Shopify-style buy button as an island on Artwork detail pages. No standalone Shop page. Operational concerns (one-of-a-kind inventory, fragile shipping, tax) are the real challenge.

tasks.title: Separate each gallery by year with text: Selected Works <year>
tasks.description: Split both galleries (paintings and ceramics) into per-year `<h2>Selected Works <year>` sections, newest year first. See ADR 0005.

tasks.title: Add optional order attribute to both schemas
tasks.description: Add an optional integer `order` attribute to both collections, used as the secondary gallery sort (after year): ascending, with unset entries placed after in slug order. Scoped per-year. See ADR 0005.

tasks.title: Remove dot that accompanies medium when medium is undefined everywhere
tasks.description: The Artwork detail meta line renders `{year} · {medium}`, leaving a dangling `<year> · ` when medium is undefined (every ceramic, medium-less paintings). Fix ArtworkDetail.astro to guard the separator like ArtworkCard already does. Sole offending site; see ADR 0005.

tasks.title: Fix video field name drift (videoSrc vs video)
tasks.description: content.config.ts defines the field as `videoSrc`, but ADR 0002, both galleries (paintings/ceramics index.astro hasDetailPage check), and ArtworkDetail.astro all read `artwork.data.video`. The field is therefore always undefined: hasDetailPage only ever fires on images.length > 1, and the YouTube embed never renders on detail pages. Reconcile on the ADR 0002 name `video` (rename the schema field, or update all readers) and confirm hasDetailPage + the embed work end to end.

tasks.title: On artwork detail page, show the description beneath year and medium
tasks.description: The description should be shown beneath the year and medium, not at the bottom of the page.

tasks.title: Create smaller version of every small image that will exist on the gallery pages
tasks.description: The current version of the gallery pages (index.astro) Create a smaller version of every small image that will exist on the gallery pages, and use that instead.

tasks.title: Image zoom on click
tasks.description: On clicking an image on the gallery if it doesn't have a detail's page, or if it does have a detail's page, when clicking on any image in the deatils page, it should fill the size of the viewport (while keeping the same aspect ratio) and have a semi-transparent backdrop. It should close on Esc or on clicking an X in the corner. A zoom cursor should display on hover when an image is zoomable.

tasks.title: Sampled-gradient + grain placeholder before each image loads
tasks.description: Show a build-time-generated placeholder behind each gallery image while it loads, then fade the real image in. Approach (scales to hundreds of images for ~50 bytes each, needs zero client JS/hydration): at build, sharp samples a 3x3 grid of colors per cover image; render those as overlapping, blurred CSS radial gradients (CSS-only) as the card placeholder; layer a single shared SVG feTurbulence film-grain overlay for painterly texture; the real <Picture> fades opacity 0->1 on load. Requires resolving content-collection ImageMetadata to the on-disk source path to sample. Targets gallery cards (ArtworkCard via GallerySection); detail-page images (ArtworkDetail) are a follow-up.
